description: Designed for the FC Bayern Munich soccer fans, this bag makes for a great Sports and gym carry bag. With a rubbery nylon lining, it's perfect to hold your sweaty clothes without raising a stink, and also allows for an easy wash. Height: 16.5" Width: 16" Depth: 10” Capacity: 24 litres Made of polyester with a nylon lining that has a rubbery feel for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment One small front zippered compartment for easy use Two mesh pockets on the sides to hold a sipper and other essentials Water resistant tarpaulin bottom Appliqued FCB badge with nike embroidered swoosh on top of a screen printed thick red stripe along the front pouch length Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable padded handles for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries, with FCB printed on right handle for style Padded back with a mesh for breathability and nike embroidered silhouette for style Care Hand wash Do not bleach Do not tumble dryDo not wringDrip dry Do not iron
